character.definition: to seize, as a bird of prey, to seize and carry off, to grasp
a cage; a basket; a noose
(same as 霸) to be chief, to rule by might rather than by right, a tyrant; a usurper; the strong the fierce ones
the wind blows, blown by the wind
halo in sky; fog; dizzy, faint
angle steel, legs of a table
